zh.Providence, Rhode Island, British Coloni: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德普洛維登斯
zh.The Parish Church of Saint Matthew, Nort: 英國英格蘭越可爾諾萊安
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Joanna Barstow於1581年出生在英國越可爾諾萊安時，她的父親Richard Barstow26歲，母親Elizabeth Valentine Stace25歲。她於1600年6月29日與Walter Wilson Rhodes在英國越可爾哈利法可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1659年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德普洛維登斯享年78歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德普洛維登斯。

zh-hans.The Parish Church of Saint Matthew, Nort: 英国英格兰越可爾諾萊安
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Joanna Barstow于1581年出生在英国越可爾諾萊安时，她的父亲Richard Barstow26岁，母亲Elizabeth Valentine Stace25岁。她于1600年6月29日与Walter Wilson Rhodes在英国越可爾哈利法可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1659年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德普洛維登斯享年78岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德普洛維登斯。

nameMeanings.name: Barstow
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from a lost place called Bairstow in Southowram, Yorkshire, probably named with Old English beger ‘berry’ + stōw ‘place’. The surname is still most common in Yorkshire.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

variants.name: Joannah

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: Providence Founded
historicEvents.description: In 1636 Providence is founded as a settlement for Rhode Island by Roger Williams

historicEvents.title: First Baptist Church
historicEvents.description: Roger Williams establishes the First Baptist Church of Rhode Island in Providence during 1638.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Joanna Barstow was born in 1581, in Northowram, Yorkshire, England, her father, Richard Barstow, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Valentine Stace, was 25. She married Walter Wilson Rhodes on 29 June 1600, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1659, in Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, at the age of 78, and was buried in Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

fr.Providence, Rhode Island, British Coloni: Providence, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Joanna Barstow est née en 1581, à Northowram, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard Barstow, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Valentine Stace, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Wilson Rhodes le 29 juin 1600, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1659, à Providence, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Providence, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.Providence, Rhode Island, British Coloni: Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Joanna Barstow 1581 in Northowram, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Barstow 26 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Valentine Stace 25. Sie hat am 29. Juni 1600 in Halifax, Yorkshire, England Walter Wilson Rhodes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1659 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America und wurde in Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Joanna Barstow è nata il nel 1581 nel Northowram, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Richard Barstow, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Valentine Stace, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Walter Wilson Rhodes il 29 giugno 1600, nel Halifax, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1659, nel Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Joanna Barstowが1581年にイギリスヨークシュアイアノーソウラムで生まれた時，父Richard Barstowは26歳，母Elizabeth Valentine Staceは25歳であった。1600年6月29日にイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスでWalter Wilson Rhodesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1659年にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドプロヴィデンスで78歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドプロヴィデンスにて埋葬された。

ko.Providence, Rhode Island, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 프로비데스
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Joanna Barstow(이)가 1581년 영국 요르크실르 노르토램에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Barstow(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Valentine Stace(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1600년 6월 29일 영국 요르크실르 할이파스에서 Walter Wilson Rhodes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1659년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 프로비데스에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 프로비데스에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Walter Wilson Rhodes em 29 de junho de 1600, em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Providence, Rhode Island, British Coloni: провиденс, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Joanna Barstow родилась в 1581 г. в местности нортоурам, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Barstow было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Valentine Stace, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Wilson Rhodes 29 июня 1600 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1659 г. в местности провиденс, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности провиденс, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика.
